items.title: 'This means everything to me' - Foden signs new Man City contract
items.summary: Man City have announced Phil Foden has signed a new contract at the club.

items.title: Foden signs new four-year Man City contract
items.summary: Manchester City midfielder Phil Foden signs a new four-year contract with the club, extending his stay until 2030.

items.summary: THE Italian FA have confirmed they have held talks with Pep Guardiola about becoming their next coach. items.title: Liverpool confident of beating Arsenal to £100m-rated Bradley Barcola as they chase marquee replacement for Mo Salah
items.summary: LIVERPOOL are confident of beating Arsenal to £100million-rated Bradley Barcola. items.title: Wrexham poach Newcastle transfer guru in huge coup for Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney’s project
items.summary: WREXHAM have secured Newcastle's head of recruitment as their new sporting director ahead of the 2026/27 Championship season. items.title: Phil Foden lands ‘significant’ payrise on £225,000-a-week wages with new Man City deal as he hails Maresca’s impact
items.summary: PHIL FODEN believes new boss Enzo Maresca can help him get back to his best after signing a new long-term deal at Manchester City. items.title: New faces, gulfs in class and flawed drama: how 48 teams changed the World Cup
items.summary: The first 48-team World Cup had its positives and negatives – do we need to brace for a 64-team future? items.title: Ipswich sign Diop from Fulham
items.summary: Ipswich Town sign Morocco defender Issa Diop from Fulham for an undisclosed fee.

items.summary: MANCHESTER UNITED and England Women hero Ella Toone has saved a historic football club from extinction after starting a surprise new career. items.title: Paredes should not be suspended - Spain's Gavi
items.summary: Spain midfielder Gavi says he does not think Argentina's Leandro Paredes should be suspended for his part in the confrontation after the World Cup final.

items.title: Who is Vinicius Junior’s girlfriend Virginia Fonseca?
items.summary: FOLLOWING Brazil's 2026 World Cup exit against Norway, star man Vinicius Junior has reportedly undergone a cosmetic procedure on his chin. items.title: EFL footballer’s brother, two, dies after heartbroken parents found him unresponsive in swimming pool on holiday
items.summary: A FOOTBALLER'S brother died after he was found unresponsive in a swimming pool on a Spanish holiday. Hartley Wareham, two, was discovered unresponsive by his heartbroken parents on the trip with family and friends.
